I remember a decade ago there was a demonstration where the demonstrators clashed with the police in osaka. I saw it on NHK then. I thought the police were no't tough enough. All the riot police were holding a truncheon in one hand and a shield in the other hand. In this way you can't really fight the protestors and arrest them since you have no free hands to grab ahold of them. Thays why it took four policemen to catch ahold of one protestor. From a fighting perspective some of the riot police should be holding just a nightstick, some just a shield the other both. The economic sanctions against Japan wouldn't be lifted until the then US president's term of office ended a year later.
